headline: DA Davidson Maintains Neutral on The Campbell's, Lowers Price Target to $20
summary: DA Davidson  analyst Brian Holland   maintains The Campbell's (NASDAQ:CPB) with a Neutral and lowers the price target from $30 to $20.
